rows.field_7233: Handles all software and system projects

fields.name: Status
fields.formula: if(today() < field('Start date'), "Scheduled", if(and(today() >field('End date'), field('Progress (tasks)') = 100), "Completed", "Active"))

fields.name: Progress (time)
fields.formula:
if(field('Start date') > now(),0,if(field('End date') < now(),100,
round((date_diff('dd',field('Start date'),now()) / date_diff('dd',field('Start date'),field('End date'))) * 100,0)))

fields.name: Status
fields.formula: if(field('All tasks completed'),'Completed',if(field('No tasks started'),'Not started yet','In progress'))

fields.name: Progress (time)
fields.formula:
if(field('Start date') > now(),0,if(field('End date') < now(),100,
round((date_diff('dd',field('Start date'),now()) / date_diff('dd',field('Start date'),field('End date'))) * 100,0)))

rows.field_7249: System design and data model approved
Marketing plan and target audience defined

rows.field_7254: Link customers to orders and tickets

rows.field_7276: Identified customers, contacts, deals, incidents and risks
Added key fields for each entity
Prepared final entity list for approval
Defined customer, deal, incident and risk relationships

rows.field_7278: I’ve finished the first version of the data model, please take a look
Looks solid, especially the customer and incident links
Great, I’ll freeze the schema then
Did you include the risk and asset tables?
Yes, both are linked via external IDs
Perfect, go ahead and finalize
Customer module is up, but validation rules are still missing
Can users already link incidents and risks?
Yes, that part is working
Good, we’ll test the rest during UAT
Did we cover Finance and HR as well?
Yes, both confirmed their systems
Great, thanks
Any critical ones we should flag now?
Two around access control and backups
Let’s make sure those get top priority
Can you align this with the CRM roles?
Yes, I’ll sync with the CRM team
Does it include escalation to executives?
Yes, critical incidents will trigger alerts
Perfect, that’s required for ISO
Target segments defined based on last year’s data
Did you include the high-margin customers?
Yes, they are a key segment
Initial banner concepts uploaded
Can you adjust the colors to match brand guidelines?
Sure, I’ll update them today
First draft of ad copy ready
We’ll need legal to review before launch
Understood, sending it to them now
Testing

subject.formula: concat('A new message was send for task ',get('previous_node.2.field_7253'))
